summary: P0 improvements testing completed. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Kiosk locked screen shows custom texts (GESPERRT, pricing_hint), Settings page has Kiosk-Texte tab with all 9 fields and PWA/App tab with 4 fields, responsive sidebar with all 11 nav items scrollable on small viewport.

issues: Logo shows 'Logo' alt text (broken image) - logo_url points to different domain with 404 response. Recommend clearing or updating logo_url.

passed_tests: P0-1: No Emergent references in HTML source (no 'emergent', 'made with', 'posthog')
P0-1: Page title is 'Darts Kiosk' (clean)
P0-2: manifest.json exists with display=standalone, 2 icons
P0-2: icon-192.png loads successfully (HTTP 200, image/png)
P0-2: icon-512.png loads successfully (HTTP 200, image/png)
P0-2: apple-touch-icon meta tag in HTML
P0-2: theme-color meta tag in HTML
P0-2: PWA/App tab shows app_name, short_name, theme_color, background_color fields
P0-3: GET /api/settings/kiosk-texts returns all 9 configurable fields
P0-3: PUT /api/settings/kiosk-texts with auth updates and persists texts
P0-3: PUT /api/settings/kiosk-texts without auth returns 401
P0-3: GET /api/settings/pwa returns all 4 fields
P0-3: PUT /api/settings/pwa with auth updates and persists config
P0-3: PUT /api/settings/pwa without auth returns 401
P0-3: Kiosk locked screen shows 'GESPERRT' (locked_title from kiosk_texts)
P0-3: Kiosk locked screen shows 'Happy Hour: 50% Rabatt!' (pricing_hint from kiosk_texts)
P0-3: Settings Kiosk-Texte tab has all 9 editable fields with save button
P0-4: Admin sidebar scrollable on 768x600 viewport
P0-4: Mobile drawer opens/closes properly
P0-4: All 11 nav items accessible (Dashboard, Boards, Einstellungen, Benutzer, Logs, Umsatz, Health, System, Discovery, Leaderboard, Berichte)
P0-4: User/logout section visible without overlap after scrolling nav
action_items: MINOR: Clear broken logo_url in branding settings or upload a valid logo image (current URL returns 404 from different domain)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 improvements tested: 1) No Emergent branding in index.html (clean). 2) PWA manifest.json with icons at /icon-192.png, /icon-512.png working. 3) Kiosk-texts API at GET/PUT /api/settings/kiosk-texts with 9 fields. PWA config at GET/PUT /api/settings/pwa with 4 fields. 4) Admin sidebar uses flexbox with overflow-y-auto, all 11 nav items scrollable. Note: logo_url points to old domain (404) - minor data cleanup needed.
